title: The 80/20 Rule
description: A coworker is overwhelmed by their backlog. Apply Pareto: which 20% drives the result?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I've got fifty things on my list this week. I don't know where to start.

templates.text: Welcome to the 80/20 problem. Twenty percent of those tasks will create most of the value.
templates.hint_zh: 你遇到 80/20 問題了。那五十項裡,大約兩成會產出絕大多數價值。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: How do I know which twenty percent?

templates.text: Ask: if I only finished one thing this week, what would matter most?
templates.hint_zh: 問自己:如果這週只能做一件,最重要的會是哪個?

templates.text: Then that's number one. Now do the same for the second and third spots.
templates.hint_zh: 那就是第一名。接著用同樣方式排第二、第三。

templates.text: Park them. Most won't matter, and you can revisit next week.
templates.hint_zh: 暫放。大多數不會有影響,下週再回頭看。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: It feels wrong to ignore eighty percent of my list.

templates.text: It feels wrong because we love motion. The result is what counts.
templates.hint_zh: 感覺怪是因為我們愛忙的感覺,但要看的是結果。
